arts.ttl: Victor Osimhen transfer news: Napoli striker admits he wants Premier League transfer
arts.sum: Victor Osimhen has made a revelation that will delight the string of Premier League clubs fighting to sign the Napoli striker in the summer. Osimhen has been tracked by several of these clubs for well over a year, and now he has said that his target in the summer is to move to the Premier League.
